beats.action: The first pale light of daybreak cuts through the jagged teeth of the Scarred Gorge. Oily, foul-smelling mist rises from the abyss.
beats.camera: Wide shot, slow pan across the gorge, showing mist.

beats.action: Kaelen stands near the precipice, his eyes narrowed as he traces geometric fractures in the stone below, mentally calculating.
beats.camera: Medium close-up on Kaelen, slow push in.

dialogue.text: The wind is funneling southward. If we draw it toward the narrowest ridge, we can limit its sweep to fifteen degrees. We strike when its mass shifts.

beats.action: Lyra's hand rests on the pommel of her blade, knuckles white. She stares down into the roiling dark of the gorge, her chest rising and falling in shallow breaths.
beats.camera: Close-up on Lyra's face, then her white-knuckled hand on the pommel.

dialogue.text: You talk of angles as if we are fighting a siege engine, Kaelen. The air itself... it feels wrong. It feels hungry.

beats.action: Master Valerius steps forward, his heavy boots grinding grit. He raises his chin, his weathered face catching the gray morning light.
beats.camera: Medium shot of Valerius, slight low angle.

dialogue.text: She has the right of it. The mountain is not breathing. Something else is using its lungs.

beats.action: A sudden, sickening pressure drops over the gorge, forcing the trio's knees to buckle. Shadows at the bottom rise like a towering wall of liquid blackness, blotting out the sunrise.
beats.camera: Wide shot of the gorge as shadow rises, then quick cut to medium shot of the trio reacting, knees buckling.

beats.action: The air hums with whispering voices. Lyra stumbles back, pressing a hand to her temple, her eyes wide with uncharacteristic dread.
beats.camera: Close-up on Lyra's face, then her hand on her temple.

dialogue.text: This... this is not a beast. It's a rot. It knows exactly what we are.

beats.action: Kaelen tries to step forward, but is frozen by the manifestation's gravity. His analytical mind spins, finding zero paths to victory.
beats.camera: Medium close-up on Kaelen, struggling to move, then a tight close-up on his eyes.

dialogue.text: The energy output... it bypasses standard cultivation thresholds. There is no structural weakness. Any direct assault has a zero-percent probability of survival.

beats.action: Valerius looks at Kaelen, then down at the rising tide of shadow. The sorrow in his eyes deepens into cold, hard certainty.
beats.camera: Medium close-up on Valerius, slight pan as his gaze shifts.

dialogue.text: It is exactly what the histories warned of. It does not want to fight us, Kaelen. It wants to hollow us out.

beats.action: The shadow wall surges closer. Lyra draws her trembling sword, her stance fractured, looking desperately at Kaelen.
beats.camera: Medium shot of Lyra, then quick cut to Kaelen, then back to Lyra.

dialogue.text: How do we fight something that is already inside our heads? Tell me, Kaelen! What is the plan?

beats.action: Kaelen stares at his own hands, realizing the horrific scale of the entity. His calculations offer no solution, only retreat.
beats.camera: Close-up on Kaelen's face, then his hands, then back to his face.

dialogue.text: We don't. We fall back. Right now.

beats.action: Valerius steps between the young cultivators and the dark, shoulders squaring. A faint golden aura flickers as he draws on his life essence.
beats.camera: Medium shot from behind Valerius, showing him facing the dark with Kaelen and Lyra behind him. Slow push in on Valerius.

dialogue.text: You cannot outrun this, not both of you. Go, Architect. Find another way. I will pay the toll to buy you the minutes.
